days.saints_uk: Св. пророка Наума
days.saints_en: St. Prophet Nahum
days.troparion_en: We celebrate the memory / of Your prophet Nahum, O Lord; / through him we entreat You, / save our souls.

days.troparion_en: We celebrate the memory / of Your prophet Habakkuk, O Lord; / through him we entreat You, / save our souls.

days.saints_en: St. Prophet Zephaniah
days.troparion_en: We celebrate the memory / of Your prophet Zephaniah, O Lord; / through him we entreat You, / save our souls.

days.saints_uk: 🕃 Святої великомучениці Варвари; Преподобного отця нашого Івана Дамаскина
days.saints_en: St. Great Martyr Barbara. Ven. John of Damascus
days.troparion_en: O most blessed Lamb Barbara, divinely illuminated by the light of the Three-sunned Trinity, you were strengthened in the font of Baptism, vanquishing the delusions of your ancestors, you confessed you

days.saints_uk: 5🕂 Преподобного й богоносного отця нашого Сави Освященного
days.saints_en: Ven. and God-Bearing Sabbas the Sanctified
days.troparion_en:
With the streams of your tears you cultivated the barrenness of the desert;  /  and by your sighs from the
depths, you bore fruit a hundredfold in your labors.  /  You became a luminary, shining upon

days.saints_uk: Неділя 28-ма по Зісланні Святого Духа. Глас 3. Єв. 6.; 🕁 Св. отця нашого Миколая, архиєпископа Мир Ликійських, чудотворця
days.saints_en: 27th Sunday after Pentecost. St. Nicholas, Archbishop of Myra in Lycia, Wonderworker
days.troparion_en: The truth of things revealed you to your flock as a rule of faith, /  a model of meekness, and a teacher of temperance.  / Through humility, you attained the heights; /  and through poverty, riches.

days.saints_en: St. Ambrose, Bishop of Milan
days.troparion_en: Let us all honor the glorious Hierarch Ambrose,  /  the namesake of ambrosia, the instructor of Italy,  /  the protector of Christ's Church, and leader of Milan,  /  a son of his diocese, and the grea

days.saints_en: Ven. Patapius
days.troparion_en:
(Podoben: “The Divine Faith...”)
In following your divine calling from your youth,  / you shone forth upon the world with the gift of your ascetical labors. /  And as one made glorious by the grace o

days.saints_en: Immaculate Conception of the Most Holy Theotokos by St. Anna
days.troparion_en: Today the bonds of childlessness are loosed, /  for having heard Joachim and Anna,  / God clearly assures them of the birth of the Mother of God,  / from whom He Himself, the Uncircumscribed One, was

days.saints_uk: Свв. мучеників Мини, Єрмогена і Євграфа.
days.saints_en: Sts. Martyrs Menas, Hermogenes & Eugraphus

days.saints_uk: Преподобного отця нашого Даниїла Стовпника.
days.saints_en: Ven. Daniel the Stylite
days.troparion_en: You were a pillar of patient endurance, / having imitated the forefathers, O Venerable One: / Job in suffering, and Joseph in temptations. / You lived like the bodiless ones while yet in the flesh, O

days.saints_uk: 🕃 Преподобного отця нашого Спиридона, чудотворця, єпископа Трімитійського.
days.saints_en: Ven. Spyridon the Wonderworker, Bishop of Trimythous
days.troparion_en: At the First Council you appeared as a champion of Truth and a Wonderworker, O our God-bearing Father Spyridon.  / For you spoke to one dead in her grave, and transformed a serpent into gold;  / while

days.saints_uk: Неділя 29-та по Зісланні Святого Духа, святих Праотців. Глас 4. Єв. 7.; 🕂 Свв. мучеників Євстратія, Авксентія, Євгенія, Мардарія й Ореста; Святої мучениці Лукії, діви.

days.troparion_en: By faith You justified the Forefathers,  /  when through them You betrothed Yourself beforehand to the Church of the Gentiles.  /  The saints boast in glory,  /  that from their seed there is a glorio

(Podoben: “Awed by the beauty of your virginity...”)

days.saints_en: St. Stephen the Confessor, Archbishop of Surozh. Hieromartyr Eleutherius. Ven. Paul of Latros
days.troparion_en: O solitary dweller with the bodiless hosts, / you took the Cross as your weapon / and stood firm against the iconoclasts, / who would not honor the icon of Christ our God. / But you cut out all wicked

days.saints_uk: Св. пророка Аггея.
days.saints_en: St. Prophet Haggai
days.troparion_en: We celebrate the memory / of Your prophet Haggai, O Lord; / through him we entreat You, / save our souls.

days.saints_uk: 🕃 Св. пророка Даниїла; Свв. трьох отроків: Ананії, Азарії й Мисаїла.
days.saints_en: St. Prophet Daniel. Sts. Three Youths: Ananias, Azarias & Misael
days.troparion_en: Great are the accomplishments of faith, / for the Three Holy Youths rejoiced in the source of the flame, as if by restful waters,1 / and the Prophet Daniel appeared as a shepherd of lions as of sheep.

days.saints_uk: Св. мученика Севастіана і тих, що з ним.
days.saints_en: St. Martyr Sebastian and those with him

days.troparion_en:
(Podoben: “Be quick to anticipate...”)

days.saints_en: Eve of the Nativity of Christ. Ven. Protomartyr Eugenia
days.troparion_en: Mary was of David’s seed, / so she went with Joseph to register in Bethlehem. / She bore in her womb the Fruit not sown by man. / The time for the birth was at hand. / Since there was no room at the i

days.saints_uk: 🕀 Різдво Господа Бога і Спаса нашого Ісуса Христа; Утр.: Єв. – Мт. 2 зач.; 1, 18-25.; Літ.: Ап. – Гал. 209 зач.; 4, 4-7. Єв. – Мт. 3 зач.; 2, 1-12.
days.saints_en: Nativity of our Lord, God and Savior Jesus Christ
days.troparion_en: Your Nativity, O Christ our God,  /  has shone to the world the Light of knowledge;  /  for by it, those who worshipped the stars / were taught by a star to adore You,  / the Sun of Righteousness,1  /

days.saints_uk: Субота по Різдві Христовому.; 🕃 Собор Пресвятої Богородиці; Св. священномученика Євтимія, єпископа Сардійського.
days.saints_en: Saturday after the Nativity. Synaxis of the Most Holy Theotokos. Hieromartyr Euthymius, Bishop of Sardis
days.troparion_en: O Most Pure Mother of God, your holy Synaxis is adorned with many diverse splendors;  / and gifts are brought to you by many peoples of the world, O Lady Theotokos. /  In your mercy, loosen the bonds

days.saints_uk: Неділя по Різдві Христовому. Пам'ять святих і праведних Йосифа Oбручника, Давида, царя, і Якова, брата Божого. Глас 6. Єв. 9.; 🕃 Св. апостола, первомученика й архидиякона Стефана; Преподобного отця нашого й ісповідника Теодора Начертанного, брата Теофана, творця канонів.
